atlantistools

atlantistools is an R package to aid in the data processing and visualization of output from Atlantis models. Using atlantistools helps Atlantis users standardize input/output which facilitates intra and inter model comparisons.

Installation 

pak::pak("Atlantis-Ecosystem-Model/atlantistools")

Getting started

Please see the getting started guide

Contact

andybeet
